channel.title: Big Data on RaihnForge
channel.description: Recent content in Big Data on RaihnForge

item.title: Concerning Data: Ethics, Big Data, and the Three Groups Who Shape What We Believe
item.description: Data Science and Big Data are growing rapidly, and their impact on modern technology now operates on a global scale. From watching the news, to tracking viruses like COVID-19, to gathering information for our entertainment, data science and Big Data have a huge role in everyday life. The power of information impresses the necessity for ethical application. Producers, communicators, and audiences must be proactive in order to mature toward greater values and higher standards.
